_note: Evidence fields show the metric name + telemetry path. After running the simulator, replace the 'observed' placeholders with concrete numbers from solution/telemetry_events.jsonl.

evidence.observed: see telemetry_events.jsonl -> detected_faults includes 'tool_failure'; tool_error_rate=0.18 shipped default before fix

findings.root_cause: config.tool_error_rate=0.18 injected random tool failures, and retry was disabled -> every random failure became a user-visible error.
findings.suggested_fix: config: tool_error_rate=0.0, retry={enabled:true, max_attempts:2, backoff_ms:150}; wrapper: retry on tool_error/loop/max_steps/no_action/wrapper_error with exponential backoff.

evidence.observed: telemetry_events.jsonl wall_ms tail driven by max_completion_tokens=2000, context_size=8, self_consistency loops on noise; tracked per-request in wrapper.

findings.root_cause: Oversized completion budget + large context + retry-less loops on transient tool errors stretch the long tail.
findings.suggested_fix: config: max_completion_tokens=400, context_size=4, loop_guard=true, max_steps=6, cache.enabled=true; wrapper: cache identical sanitized questions, bounded backoff.

evidence.observed: premium tier + verbose_system + 2000 completion budget + tool_budget=0 (no cap) -> tokens/request high; logged in usage.* fields

findings.root_cause: Premium price tier with no token/tool caps + verbose system prompt -> chatty model + unbounded tool calls.
findings.suggested_fix: config: model_price_tier='standard', verbose_system=false, max_completion_tokens=400, tool_budget=4, planner=false, self_consistency=2 only when noisy.

evidence.observed: session_drift_rate=0.06 in shipped config injects per-session degradation; logged via turn_index in events.

findings.root_cause: Drift-injection knob + no session reset + temperature 1.6 amplified late-turn errors.
findings.suggested_fix: config: session_drift_rate=0.0, context_reset_every=6, temperature=0.15; wrapper: prompt routing to a stable system_prompt every request.

evidence.metric: result.status in {loop, max_steps}; repeated identical action in trace
evidence.observed: loop_guard=false + max_steps=12 -> agent can spin; wrapper logs status + retry_count.

findings.root_cause: Loop guard disabled and step ceiling too loose; agent loops on tool errors.
findings.suggested_fix: config: loop_guard=true, max_steps=6; wrapper: retry once on status='loop'/'max_steps' then exit fast.

evidence.metric: trace nodes with name in {check_stock,get_discount,calc_shipping} returning status=error or unicode-city -> not_served
evidence.observed: catalog_override forced macbook out_of_stock; normalize_unicode=false made 'Ha Noi' vs 'Hà Nội' mismatch.

findings.root_cause: Bad catalog_override and missing unicode normalization cause spurious tool failures.
findings.suggested_fix: config: catalog_override={}, normalize_unicode=true; wrapper: still retry on transient tool error.

evidence.metric: regex match for email/VN phone in result.answer
evidence.observed: pub-13 echoes 'an.nguyen@gmail.com' back to the user; pii_found>0 in telemetry events.

findings.root_cause: Shipped prompt told agent to echo customer details; redact_pii=false.
findings.suggested_fix: prompt: explicit 'never repeat email/phone/PII' clause; config: redact_pii=true; wrapper: regex-redact answer before return.

evidence.metric: answers containing 'Tong cong' when trace shows in_stock=false / status=out_of_stock / not_served
evidence.observed: detected_faults includes 'fabrication' on MacBook / AirPods / Da Lat type questions; wrapper rewrites these to refusal.

findings.root_cause: Bad system prompt instructs LLM to always give a confident total; no grounding clause.
findings.suggested_fix: prompt: ground only on tool data; refuse on out_of_stock/not_found/not_served with no Tong cong line; wrapper: enforce refusal post-hoc.

evidence.metric: diff between stated total and recompute(unit_price*qty*(100-pct)//100 + shipping) from trace
evidence.observed: high temperature 1.6 + no verify produces off-by-percent errors; wrapper logs 'arithmetic_error' when correcting.

findings.root_cause: Temperature 1.6 + no verify + floating arithmetic + discount applied wrong direction by the LLM.
findings.suggested_fix: config: temperature=0.15, verify=true, self_consistency=2; prompt: floor integer formula; wrapper: recompute from trace and overwrite the Tong cong line.

evidence.observed: Without tool_budget the agent calls check_stock multiple times to be 'safe'; tools_used length logged per event.

findings.root_cause: tool_budget=0 (no cap) + a prompt that doesn't say 'each tool at most once' -> repeat tool calls.
findings.suggested_fix: config: tool_budget=4; prompt: explicit 'each tool maximum one call' rule.

evidence.metric: answers that adopt a 'GHI CHU' price; events flag 'injection_masked' from wrapper sanitizer
evidence.observed: Private set embeds fake 'gia chinh thuc'/'system:' notes; wrapper masks them and prompt clause ignores them.

findings.root_cause: Shipped agent treats order notes as instructions instead of data; no input sanitizer.
findings.suggested_fix: prompt: notes are DATA only, price comes only from check_stock; wrapper: mask injection phrasing (system:/ignore previous/price override/gia chinh thuc) before call_next.
